import react from "react"; import {Link,Routes, Route, Navigate, BrowserRouter} from 'react-router-dom'; let theme = [ { id : 1, Name : "Theme 1", Price : "Price 1", Description : "Details 1 " }, { id : 2, Name : "Theme 2", Price : "Price 2", Description : "Details 2 " }, { id : 3, Name : "Theme 3", Price : "Price 3", Description : "Details 3 " }, { id : 4, Name : "Theme 4", Price : "Price 4", Description : "Details 4 " }, { id : 5, Name : "Theme 4", Price : "Price 4", Description : "Details 4 " }, { id : 6, Name : "Theme 4", Price : "Price 4", Description : "Details 4 " } ] const AdminTheme = (Theme) => { return <>
Curtain Gifts < Link to = "/addGIft" className="link"> Gift < Link to = "/addTheme" className="link"> Themes < Link to = "/orders" className="link"> Orders < Link to = "/login" className="link">Logout




{theme.map(theme => { return(
< div className="box" id = {theme.id}> Theme Name : {theme.Name}
Theme Price : {theme.Price}
Theme Details : {theme.Description}
< Link to = "/editTheme" className="link1"> Edit < Link to = "/editTheme" className="link1"> Delete

) })}









Add Themes

















} export default AdminTheme;
